expectations.evidence: Uses generic launchctl and ps aux commands, not the dedicated ecosystem status script

expectations.text: Reports status for multiple automation systems
expectations.evidence: Does not identify specific systems. Says 'Several LaunchAgents are loaded' generically

expectations.text: Shows running/idle/stale/down status for each system

expectations.evidence: No attention flagging. Suggests creating a monitoring script instead

expectations.text: Presents results in a dashboard or summary format
expectations.evidence: No dashboard. Offers to help build one as a next step
